agentAbility.name: Echo Proxy
agentAbility.description: Deploy a proxy of your tank with identical parameters and modules, and switch between the two to throw enemies off scent.

agentTrait.name: Signature Masking
agentTrait.description: Exceeding an Energy threshold recodes the vehicle's electronic signature, hiding it from enemy HUDs until you fire.

primaryAttack.name: ATGM Launcher
primaryAttack.description: Missile launcher with manual guidance to target.

tankAbilities.name: Feign Destruction
tankAbilities.description: Disguise your vehicle as a battlefield wreckage to mislead enemies and become Masked until firing.

tankAbilities.name: Electro-Optical Jam
tankAbilities.description: Activate jamming devices that interfere with enemy targeting systems, reducing their accuracy at range.
